original_text:
### Layout Principles
- Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.
- "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.
- Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**
- Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

relations.note: Metadata declaration is the process mechanism that enforces the adjacent non-repeat background alternation rule.

quotes: Generous white space; clean, never cluttered.
Limit focal points per section — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Prevent visual competition within a section so the key message reads clearly.
rules.rule_text: Layouts must use generous white space and stay uncluttered, limiting each section to a single dominant focal point; use contrast to direct attention to that one most-important element.

quotes: "Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

rules.intent: Improve scannability and visual interest by pairing copy with imagery/icons.
rules.rule_text: Favor 'show, don't tell': break up long text passages with imagery and icons rather than dense copy blocks.

quotes: alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge
Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge.

rules.intent: Keep sequential sections visually distinct when assembled from independent components.
rules.rule_text: Color blocks delineate topics (per the My Compass webpage pattern): rotate section backgrounds among White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#E6F0F9), Golden Sand (#FEF1C8), and gradient fills so that no two adjacent assembled sections share the same background and visually merge.

quotes: [GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.

rules.intent: Enable automated/manual assembly to enforce non-repeating adjacent background sequencing across independently authored sections.
rules.rule_text: Section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so downstream assemblers can sequence sections and avoid placing two identical adjacent backgrounds next to each other.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

rules.intent: Preserve the brand's single authoritative storytelling structure across all patient-facing content.
rules.rule_text: Use the canonical content block sequence — bold headline, then simple benefit statements, then a patient quote — as defined by the patient brochure, which is the reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials.
